content.description: Template content keyed by channel. Replaced as a whole on update, not merged.

design.description: Unlayer design JSON saved by the in-app visual editor; present only on editor-authored templates.

html.description: Full HTML document sent verbatim as the email body. Supports Liquid templating.

subject.description: Email subject line. Supports Liquid templating. Required for email-type templates.

text.description: Plain-text fallback body, sent alongside the HTML.

email.description: Email message content. Replaced as a whole on update — send the complete object.

templating.description:
Templating language for subject/html/text. Defaults to 'liquid'; hog treats braces as syntax.

* `hog` - hog
* `liquid` - liquid

deleted.description: Soft-delete flag. Set true to remove the template from the library.

description.description: What the template is for and when to use it.

message_category.description: Message category ID to file the template under. Must belong to the same project.

name.description: Human-readable template name shown in the library.

type.description: Message channel of the template. Currently 'email'.
